# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth


_format_version: "2.1"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              policy: local
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              policy: local
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 60
              policy: local

upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    hosts:
      - host: user-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 1000
  - name: product-service-upstream
    hosts:
      - host: product-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 1000
  - name: order-service-upstream
    hosts:
      - host: order-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 1000

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_names:
        - apikey
      anonymous: ""
      hide_credentials: false
      rsa_public_key: ""
      run_on_preflight: true

    config:
      minute: 60
      policy: local
      sync_rate: 0
      fault_tolerant: true
      redis:
        host: redis
        port: 6379
        database: 0
        password: ""
        ssl: false
        ssl_verify: true
        ssl_server_name: ""
        timeout: 2000
        pool_size: 10
        connection_retries: 1
        connection_timeout: 1000

        connection_pool_idle_timeout: 30000
